svg.title: Macrogen Ibero-America · Website page structure
svg.desc: Sitemap diagram showing all 20 pages organized by section: home, about, services overview with 10 detail pages, blog with 4 posts, newsletter, contact, and external ordering portal.
svg.text: SHARED ASSETS — used by every page
Why this matters: change main.css once → every page updates. Replace logo.png → every page sees the new logo.
This is the engineering benefit of the static-site approach.
KEY · how to read this map

g.text: linked from header on every page
All pages share the same header, footer, and visual identity — built from the same template.

svg.text: 20 PAGES TOTAL · 6 TOP SECTIONS · 1 SHARED DESIGN SYSTEM · ~25 KB CSS · <100 LINES JS
